title: pilosella setifolia
intro: Pilosella setifolia, also known as Alpine Mouse-ear, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Pilosella setifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
